name: Prisoner
description: You are incarcerated in an Imperial prison facility, labor camp, or reform colony. Not a career one usually chooses — typically entered via failed qualification, mishap, or draft.

thug.name: Thug
thug.description: You survive through sheer physical presence. Other prisoners step aside.

thief.name: Thief
thief.description: You get by on wit and sleight of hand — stealing rations, smuggling contraband, avoiding notice.

enforcer.name: Enforcer
enforcer.description: You work for one of the prison gangs or for the warden — collecting debts, keeping order, making examples.

mishaps.1: Severely injured in a riot, assault, or accident. Roll on the Injury Table.
mishaps.2: You make a powerful enemy inside — a gang leader, a guard, or a fellow prisoner with outside connections. Gain an Enemy and muster out.
mishaps.3: You are transferred to a harsher facility. Lose one benefit roll from this term and gain Streetwise 1.
mishaps.4: You contract a disease or long-term injury in the cells. Reduce END by 1 and add Cr20,000 in medical debt.
mishaps.5: You witness — or participate in — something you can't undo. Gain an Enemy, and gain Deception 1.
mishaps.6: Injured in solitary or a labor accident. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected.
events.3: A riot engulfs your block. Roll Melee (unarmed) 8+ or Stealth 8+ to survive unharmed. On failure, roll on the Injury Table.
events.4: You befriend a fellow prisoner with valuable connections. Gain a Contact in the criminal underworld or among political dissidents.
events.5: You smuggle contraband or run a side operation. Gain DM+2 to your next Benefit roll, or pick up Streetwise 1, Deception 1, or Gambler 1.
events.6: You serve your time quietly and learn. Gain one of Athletics 1, Melee (unarmed) 1, Streetwise 1, or Deception 1.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: A parole hearing comes up. Roll SOC 8+ or Advocate 8+. On success, you leave at the end of this term with no penalty. On failure, gain DM-2 to your next Advancement roll.
events.9: You cross a guard or a gang. Roll END 8+ or Melee 8+ to endure. On failure, roll on the Injury Table and gain an Enemy.
events.10: You earn respect inside. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement roll.
events.11: You study in the prison library or learn a trade behind bars. Gain one level of Admin, Medic, Advocate, Mechanic, or Language.
events.12: You organize something big — a strike, a protest, an escape attempt. You are automatically promoted and gain an Ally among the other prisoners.
